asset_type: TaraHome technical blog cover, wide landscape
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: TaraHome technical blog cover, wide 16:10 landscape
Primary request: a practical homeowner troubleshooting a local Matter and Thread smart-home network in a warm lived-in living room
Scene/backdrop: warm residential living room with oak side table, natural plaster wall, soft morning window light, restrained dark-green textile accents
Subject: an adult homeowner seen naturally from the side, seated near an open unbranded laptop while checking a small wall plug and a simple unbranded door sensor; a plain smart bulb rests nearby as a realistic spare; the laptop screen is angled away and softly out of focus with no readable interface
Style/medium: clean high-end editorial residential photography, candid and believable, natural materials and real household texture
Composition/framing: wide horizontal composition suitable for both 16:10 article hero and 16:9 card crop; keep the person, laptop, plug, and sensor safely within the center crop; no headline space required
Lighting/mood: calm practical troubleshooting, natural soft daylight, warm neutral color balance, restrained dark-green accents
Constraints: no text, no logos, no watermarks, no recognizable branded devices, no invented product hardware, no embedded headline, no screen legibility
Avoid: diagrams, charts, graphs, decorative network lines, routing paths, glowing connection trails, translucent panels, inset frames, floating UI cards, progress bars, holograms, sci-fi styling, excessive beige device lineup, generic AI-tech imagery
